mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recipe WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe(title, category_id, ingredients, steps, cooking_time, difficulty, image_url, author_id, view_count) VALUES(#{title}, #{categoryId}, #{ingredients}, #{steps}, #{cookingTime}, #{difficulty}, #{imageUrl}, #{authorId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe SET title = #{title}, category_id = #{categoryId}, ingredients = #{ingredients}, steps = #{steps}, cooking_time = #{cookingTime}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE recipe SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id WHERE r.id < #{currentId} ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id WHERE r.id > #{currentId} ORDER BY r.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT difficulty, COUNT(*) as count FROM recipe GROUP BY difficulty
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM recipe WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id WHERE r.id < #{currentId} ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id WHERE r.id > #{currentId} ORDER BY r.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.*, c.name as category_name, u.real_name as author_name FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.author_id = u.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT difficulty, COUNT(*) as count FROM recipe GROUP BY difficulty
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM recipe WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
